speakers.name: Dr. Rajesh Gupta
speakers.bio: Dr. Rajesh Gupta is a visionary entrepreneur and technologist who founded TechCorp India, now valued at over $2 billion. An IIT Delhi alumnus, he has been at the forefront of India's tech revolution for over two decades.

session.title: Building India's Tech Unicorns: Lessons from the Trenches

speakers.name: Priya Sharma
speakers.bio: Priya Sharma is a leading voice in India's venture capital ecosystem. With over $500 million in successful investments across 50+ startups, she has helped shape the country's startup landscape.

session.title: Funding the Future: What VCs Look for in 2026

speakers.name: Hon. Amit Kumar
speakers.bio: Hon. Amit Kumar serves as the Minister for Electronics & Information Technology, driving India's digital transformation agenda and policy frameworks for the tech sector.

session.title: India's Vision 2047: Policy Roadmap for Digital Economy

speakers.name: Ananya Reddy
speakers.bio: Ananya Reddy leads GreenTech Solutions, India's fastest-growing clean energy startup. Her company has deployed renewable energy solutions across 15 states.

speakers.name: Vikram Singh
speakers.bio: Vikram Singh is pioneering artificial intelligence research in India. His work on AI-driven healthcare solutions has impacted over 10 million lives.

speakers.name: Kavita Nair
speakers.bio: Kavita Nair revolutionized digital payments in India with FinTech Plus, processing over $10 billion in transactions monthly. IIT Bombay alumna and Forbes 40 under 40.

session.title: Panel: Future of FinTech in India

speakers.name: Arjun Malhotra
speakers.bio: Arjun Malhotra manages a $2 billion portfolio focused on Indian tech companies. With 25+ years of experience, he has been instrumental in several IPOs and unicorn exits.

speakers.name: Dr. Meera Patel
speakers.bio: Dr. Meera Patel is a renowned scientist leading India's quantum computing research. She holds 15 patents and has published over 100 research papers.

session.title: Keynote: The Quantum Leap - India's Next Frontier

categories.name: Keynote Speakers
